creator: sherwink@ix.netcom.com
text:
It turns out to almost certainly be hardware. I moved the modem to
cuaa1, and the problem disappears. This was with the Diamond 3D 2000 (S3
Virge) card. I have not yet changed the modem location in the other
machine, with the Matrox Millennium, but since the symptoms were
identical, moving the modem should work there too.
